## Evaluation

<!-- How did you test this change?
     What were the results?
     Include before/after if applicable.
     What edge cases did you test? -->

## Rigor checklist

- [ ] Skills changes tested with evals/evals.json
- [ ] Tested on happy path AND edge cases
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PHI added
- [ ] SKILL.md is under 500 lines
- [ ] name field matches directory name exactly
- [ ] All links and references are valid

## Human review

- [ ] A human has reviewed the complete diff
- [ ] Human gave explicit approval to submit
